message:
test(harness): RFC 6330 conformance test suite (bd-1tup)

26 tests verifying asupersync RaptorQ at the mathematical level:
- GF(256) tables: exhaustive 65536-pair consistency with naive polynomial mul
- Worked example 0xA3 * 0x47 = 0xE1 with intermediate log/exp values
- Field axioms (associativity, distributivity, commutativity) for 1000 triples
- Generator order = 255, inverse properties for all nonzero elements
- LDPC circulant: 3 nonzeros/column with stride formula, GF(2) only, identity block
- HDPC: GF(256) entries present (INV-HDPC-GF256), PI identity block, alpha variety
- L = K + S + H for K=1..500 + large K, S always prime for K=1..1000
- Encode/decode roundtrip for K in {4, 10, 50, 100, 500}
- Erasure recovery, systematic emission, encoding determinism
- RFC 6330 rand/deg function bounds, E2E conformance vectors

Also: clippy fixes for decode_proofs too_many_arguments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
